allow: Bash(ls -la ~/Desktop/ 2>&1 | grep -i -E "\\.mov|\\.mp4|recording" ; echo "--- broader search ---"; find ~/Desktop ~/Downloads ~/Movies -maxdepth 2 -iname "*.mov" -o -iname "*.mp4" 2>/dev/null | head; echo "--- tools ---"; which avconvert sips qt_tools 2>&1; ls /opt/homebrew/bin/ffmpeg /usr/local/bin/ffmpeg 2>&1)
